# Architecture

Use Vite.

Use React Router with createBrowserRouter.

Use layouts with Outlet.

Prefer reusable components.

Prefer composition over duplication.

Folder structure:

src/
components/
pages/
layouts/
hooks/
services/
utils/
types/
assets/

Each page folder should have its own css file and img folder.

Create components only when they are reused or improve readability.

Keep components focused on a single responsibility.

Prefer simple solutions.
